'''Delderaan''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="GG22" /> located in the [[Delderaan system/Legends|Delderaan system]], a part of the [[Noonian sector/Legends|Noonian sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Long before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Delderaan's northern regions were home to several tribes that had primitive art. The [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]–type [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]], due to its multi-[[Color/Legends|colored]] bands of [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] [[Gas/Legends|gas]], resembled an intricate ball of yarns woven by artists of the Delderaan tribes and thrown into the [[Local day/Legends|night]] sky.<ref name="GG22" />

==Behind the scenes==
Delderaan was first mentioned in the [[1989]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]'', which was published for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG2">''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Delderaan [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Delderaan itself, in grid square N-6.<ref name="TEA" />
